and I think a useful

One of the most

Supervised learning is
the technology that has

made computers very good
when given an input,

to generate a
corresponding output,
which I'm going to call B.
Look at a few examples.
Given an email,
supervised learning can decide
if that email is spam or not.
The input A is an email and

the output B is
either zero or one,

where zero is not
spam and one is spam.

This is how spam

As a second example,

probably the most

not the most inspiring,

but lucrative for
some companies that

I've ever worked on was

where given an ad and some

an AI system can
generate an output B

not you're likely to

By showing slightly
more relevant ads,
this drives significant revenue

In self-driving cars and in

supervised learning

what's in front of

position of other cars.
Give it a medical x-ray,

It turns out the

supervised learning.

But what we found

2010 was that for a

This means, for example,

out with friends.
